Abhidhammapiṭaka/X/Suttantabhājanīyavaṇṇ.text: Ma 1. 10; Saṁ 1. 265 piṭṭhesu. 2. Khu 1. 232; Dī 3. 181 piṭṭhesu.

Vibhaṅgamūlaṭīkā/X/Suttantabhājanīyavaṇṇ.text: Ma 1. 10; Saṁ 1. 265 piṭṭhesu. 2. Khu 1. 232; Dī 3. 181 piṭṭhesu.

Abhidhammapiṭaka/X/Suttantabhājanīya/225.text: Saṅkhārasaddagahaṇenāti ṭīkāyaṁ, saṅkhārasaddena gahaṇanti pana mūlapāṭhena tattha bhavitabbaṁ.

Vibhaṅgaanuṭīkā/X/Suttantabhājanīyavaṇṇa.text: Tadetaṁ pana akāraṇabhāvasseva (bahūsu), tadetaṁ natthi kāraṇabhāvasseva (Ka)
Tadetaṁ pana akāraṇabhāvasseva (bahūsu), tadetaṁ natthi kāraṇabhāvasseva (Ka)
